questions.explanation: Kingdom Monera includes all prokaryotic organisms like bacteria. They lack a well-defined nucleus.
Mammals are warm-blooded (endothermic) animals that maintain constant body temperature. They also have hair and mammary glands.

questions.correctAnswer: The system of naming organisms with two names: genus and species.
questions.explanation: Binomial nomenclature gives each organism a two-part scientific name: Genus species (e.g., Homo sapiens for humans).

questions.text: The basic unit of classification is ________.
questions.explanation: Species is the basic unit of biological classification. It is the lowest taxonomic category.
